# Run guide

To stand up the victim, run the pinned clone command below.

```bash
git clone https://github.com/vulhub/vulhub.git
docker compose up -d
```

This guide contains a REAL command a reader will copy-paste — the bare
`git clone` in this fenced block MUST be flagged, because run-guides ship
real commands. (Decision pinned in tests/test_pins_gate.py: .md fenced code
blocks ARE scanned.)
